message:
fix(engine): correct 4 bugs found in deep code audit

- object_model.rs: fix array index detection to use u32 per ES2020 §9.4
  (array indices are 0..2^32-2, not 0..2^64-1). Also fix instance_of()
  prototype chain traversal to check depth before equality, consistent
  with get_property/has_property/for_in_keys patterns.

- revocation_chain.rs: remove dead code statement (line 751) that
  computed self.audit_events.len() and discarded the result. The
  immutable verify_chain() cannot push audit events; the mutable
  verify_chain_mut() wrapper handles that correctly.

- golden_vectors.rs: add missing RevocationReason::Administrative
  variant to golden_revocation_chain_all_reasons test (was only testing
  4 of 5 variants). Fix comment "All 8 domains" → "All 9 domains" to
  match actual ObjectDomain::ALL count.

- descent_certificate_gate.rs: fix test field names to match actual API
  (config.min_coverage, excluded_regions).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
